Tarot Readings
Reiki Healing
Welcome Amber, Our New Shamanic Reiki Practitioner!
We're delighted to welcome Amber, also known as Scáthach (ska-hath), to our team as our new Shamanic Reiki Practitioner.
Scáthach is dedicated to creating and holding a safe, non-judgmental space where you can truly be yourself. She strives to ensure every individual feels understood, valued, and experiences an authentic, meaningful connection.
As a facilitator and space holder for the human soul connection, Scáthach's vision is rooted in the good of all, honoring sacred space within the heart of unconditional love.
Session Offerings:
Reiki 60min sessions:$65
Shamanic Healing & Reiki 90 min sessions: $100
Shamanic Reiki Healings
Tarot Classes
We offer private one-on-one classes to beginners who want to learn tarot and those that wish to become more advanced tarot readers. You will learn the basics, the card meanings, how to connect to your spirit guides and intuition, tarot spreads and everything in between.
Each class is a duration of 30-45 mins.
Tarot 1 consists of 4 total classes.
The first private session is $50.00 & comes with a FREE Rider Waite Tarot Deck.
The remaining 3 classes of Tarot 1 are only $35.00 per 30-45 minute class.

Our Story
Welcome to Minarealm Crystals; The Ultimate Mineral Realm & Metaphysical Gift shop! We are passionate about providing our customers with genuine and unique crystals, fossils, rare and raw minerals, jewelry, carvings, spiritual items, and much more at very competitive and affordable prices that fit any budget. We source our products from all over the world, ensuring that we have one of the largest and advanced selections to choose from. We work very hard to provide ethically sourced products.
We have a constant flow of new inventory and our knowledgeable staff is always here to help you find the perfect item to suit your needs. We do extensive research on our items and we believe wholeheartedly in the healing energy of crystals and aim to share our crystal healing knowledge with our customers. Come visit us today and explore the wonders of Minarealm Crystals.
About the Owner
My name is Cynthia Rodriguez, and I am a Crystal, Fossil & Rock enthusiast. My dream, since I was 10 years old, was to own my own crystal store.
I finally took a leap of faith at 25. I quit my job and opened my storefront in Fenton Michigan in February, 2022. Minarealm is my biggest blessing and I know that this is what I am put here to do with my life. Minarealm has touched a lot of hearts and helped a lot of people on their spiritual journey. I will continue to offer my knowledge of crystals and their properties to all who visit the store and continue to create the ultimate Mineral Realm for everyone to enjoy.

pages.text:

Shop

About

One of the most important crystal to have in your collection is Selenite or Satin Spar, as it is the ultimate cleansing and charging stone that never needs to be cleansed or charged itself! Selenite & Satin spar will always operate with the same high vibration and energetic power. Due to it’s ability to cleanse and dispel negative energy, it’s great to use to recharge & cleanse yourself and other crystals, pendulums and any other spiritual tools you may have.
Peach Satin Spar doesnt only cleanse but also aids in:
Healing old emotional wounds.
Promotes Mental clarity.
Enhance consciousness.
Cuts cords of dysfunctional energy from the etheric body.
Directs high frequency energy into the body, stimulating spiritual, physical, and emotional healing.
Opens the inner self to the spiritual world.
Acts as a tool for enlightenment as it creates a link between spirit and matter.
Peach Selenite is believed to transform negative energy into love, forgiveness, and acceptance.
Peach Selenite can be used to increase self-awareness, self-esteem, and willpower.
Balances the Sacral Chakra.
Wards away evil spirits and toxicity.
The peach color is naturally occurring, and stems from the inclusions of other minerals during formation from the Sahara sand.
Minarealm Crystals has a wide variety of Peach Satin Spar options...small bowls, large bowls, tumbles, worry stones, palmstones, hearts and more!
Peach Satin Spar "Selenite" Heart Bowl
